title: Meghalaya Budget Explorer
description: Explore the breathtaking landscapes of Meghalaya on a budget-friendly itinerary. Visit the iconic Living Root Bridge, crystal-clear Dawki River, and the cleanest village in Asia. Perfect for solo travelers and backpackers seeking raw natural beauty.
inclusions: 4 nights accommodation in budget guesthouses/homestays
Breakfast and dinner daily
Shared cab transfers between major destinations
Local guide for Living Root Bridge trek
Boat ride at Dawki River

days.title: Arrival in Shillong – City Exploration
days.image: Shillong Ward Lake morning reflection Meghalaya
activities: Arrive at Shillong, check-in to guesthouse by noon
Visit Ward Lake and stroll Police Bazar (2:00 PM – 4:00 PM)
Explore Elephant Falls at dusk (5:00 PM – 6:30 PM)

days.title: Shillong Peak & Don Bosco Museum
days.image: Shillong Peak panoramic view cloud city Meghalaya
activities: Morning visit to Shillong Peak for sunrise views (6:00 AM – 8:00 AM)
Don Bosco Museum of Indigenous Cultures (10:00 AM – 1:00 PM)
Afternoon rest and evening local market walk at Police Bazar

days.title: Cherrapunji – Waterfalls & Caves
days.image: Nohkalikai Falls Cherrapunji highest plunge waterfall India
activities: Drive to Cherrapunji (2.5 hrs), visit Nohkalikai Falls viewpoint (10:00 AM)
Mawsmai Cave exploration (12:30 PM – 1:30 PM)
Seven Sisters Falls and Eco Park sunset view (3:30 PM – 5:30 PM)

days.title: Double Decker Living Root Bridge Trek
days.image: Double Decker Living Root Bridge Nongriat Cherrapunji trek
activities: Early start: trek down to Nongriat village for Double Decker Root Bridge (7:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Swimming in natural pool near the bridge (11:00 AM – 12:30 PM)
Trek back up to Tyrna village (1:00 PM – 4:00 PM)

days.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong – Departure
days.image: Dawki Umngot River crystal clear boat ride Bangladesh border
activities: Morning drive to Dawki, boat ride on crystal-clear Umngot River (8:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Visit Mawlynnong – Asia's Cleanest Village (12:30 PM – 2:30 PM)
Drive back to Shillong for departure (4:00 PM onwards)

title: Meghalaya Family Adventure
description: A thoughtfully crafted family itinerary blending natural wonders with cultural experiences in Meghalaya. Enjoy easy nature walks, fascinating caves, river boating, and the legendary living root bridges with your family. Comfortable stays and family-friendly pacing throughout.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in family rooms at comfortable hotels
Breakfast and dinner daily
Private cab transfers for the entire trip
Entry fees to Mawsmai Cave, Eco Park, and Elephant Falls
Boat ride at Dawki River for the family

days.title: Arrival in Shillong – Family Check-in
days.image: Shillong city view clouds green hills Meghalaya
activities: Arrive Shillong, transfer to hotel, freshen up
Evening visit to Ward Lake – paddle boating for kids (4:00 PM – 6:00 PM)
Dinner at a local Meghalayan restaurant (7:30 PM)

days.title: Shillong Sightseeing – Waterfalls & Museum
days.image: Elephant Falls three-tier waterfall Shillong Meghalaya
activities: Elephant Falls – three-tiered waterfall walk (9:00 AM – 10:30 AM)
Don Bosco Museum – interactive cultural exhibits for children (11:00 AM – 1:30 PM)
Shillong Peak viewpoint for panoramic family photos (3:30 PM – 5:00 PM)

days.title: Cherrapunji – Caves and Waterfalls
days.image: Mawsmai Cave limestone Cherrapunji Meghalaya
activities: Drive to Cherrapunji, visit Nohkalikai Falls – India's highest plunge waterfall (10:00 AM)
Mawsmai Cave – short family-friendly cave walk (12:00 PM – 1:00 PM)
Seven Sisters Falls viewpoint and Eco Park (3:00 PM – 5:00 PM)

days.title: Single Decker Root Bridge & Natural Pool
days.image: Living Root Bridge Nongriat natural pool Meghalaya
activities: Easy trek to Single Decker Root Bridge at Mynteng (family-friendly, 1 hr each way)
Picnic lunch near the bridge with packed meals
Dainthlen Falls visit on return (3:30 PM – 5:00 PM)

days.title: Mawlynnong & Dawki River
days.image: Mawlynnong Asia cleanest village bamboo walkway Meghalaya
activities: Drive to Mawlynnong village – sky walk and village tour (9:00 AM – 11:30 AM)
Dawki Umngot River boat ride – transparent water experience (1:00 PM – 3:00 PM)
Return to Shillong via scenic highway (4:30 PM – 7:00 PM)

days.title: Laitlum Canyons & Departure
days.image: Laitlum Canyons vast gorge Shillong Meghalaya
activities: Morning visit to Laitlum Canyons – stunning canyon views (7:30 AM – 10:00 AM)
Shopping at Police Bazar for Meghalayan handicrafts (11:00 AM – 12:30 PM)
Transfer for departure (2:00 PM onwards)

title: Meghalaya Romantic Escape
description: Discover Meghalaya's misty hills, secret waterfalls, and ancient root bridges with your partner on this dreamy honeymoon itinerary. Stay in boutique properties with valley views, enjoy candlelit dinners, and create unforgettable memories in the abode of clouds.
inclusions: 5 nights in boutique/heritage properties with couple room upgrades
Breakfast and candlelit dinners daily
Private cab transfers throughout
Couples' sunset boat ride at Dawki
Flower welcome amenities and honeymoon cake

days.title: Arrival – Romantic Welcome in Shillong
days.image: Shillong misty valley sunset boutique hotel Meghalaya
activities: Arrive Shillong, honeymoon welcome at boutique hotel with flower decor
Sunset stroll at Ward Lake – paddle boat ride (4:30 PM – 6:00 PM)
Candlelit dinner at a rooftop restaurant overlooking the valley (8:00 PM)

days.title: Misty Mornings – Shillong Peak & Falls
days.image: Elephant Falls misty romantic morning Shillong
activities: Sunrise at Shillong Peak with coffee (6:00 AM – 8:00 AM)
Romantic walk at Elephant Falls (10:00 AM – 11:30 AM)
Explore Police Bazar for local jewellery and evening leisure (4:00 PM – 6:00 PM)

days.title: Cherrapunji – Cloud Kingdom
days.image: Nohkalikai Falls misty romantic viewpoint Cherrapunji
activities: Drive to Cherrapunji through cloud-wrapped roads (8:30 AM)
Nohkalikai Falls viewpoint – dramatic 340m plunge (10:30 AM – 12:00 PM)
Seven Sisters Falls at golden hour (4:00 PM – 5:30 PM)

days.title: Living Root Bridge Trek – Nature & Love
days.image: Double Decker Living Root Bridge Nongriat green canopy Meghalaya
activities: Trek to Double Decker Living Root Bridge – 3.5 km trek through jungle (7:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Private picnic lunch amid the forest
Return trek and relaxing evening at resort (3:00 PM onwards)

days.title: Dawki & Mawlynnong – Crystal Waters
days.image: Dawki river crystal clear boat sunset romantic Meghalaya
activities: Couples' boat ride on Umngot River at Dawki (9:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Mawlynnong village walk – bamboo sky walk (12:30 PM – 2:30 PM)
Romantic dinner under the stars at Cherrapunji resort (8:00 PM)

days.title: Mawphlang & Farewell
days.image: Mawphlang Sacred Forest ancient stones Meghalaya
activities: Morning guided walk through Mawphlang Sacred Forest (8:00 AM – 10:00 AM)
Souvenir shopping – local honey and bamboo crafts (11:00 AM – 12:30 PM)
Transfer for departure (2:00 PM onwards)

title: Meghalaya Wild Trails Adventure
description: Push your limits in the wilderness of Meghalaya with challenging root bridge treks, caving expeditions, and river kayaking. This adventure package takes you deep into the rainforest trails and canyon edges that most tourists never experience.
inclusions: 5 nights accommodation in trekker lodges and eco-camps
All meals (breakfast, lunch, dinner) on trek days
Expert adventure guide for all activities
Trekking and caving equipment rental
Kayaking session at Dawki River

days.title: Arrival & Shillong Orientation
days.image: Shillong adventure gear preparation hills Meghalaya
activities: Arrive Shillong, gear briefing and route planning with guide
Evening conditioning walk at Laitlum Canyons rim (4:00 PM – 6:00 PM)
Briefing on safety protocols and next day trek plan

days.title: Laitlum Canyons Full Trek
days.image: Laitlum Canyons deep gorge trekking trail Meghalaya
activities: Full day Laitlum Canyon descent and base exploration (7:00 AM – 12:00 PM)
Packed lunch at the canyon base
Ascent back and evening at leisure (2:00 PM – 5:00 PM)

days.title: Double Decker Root Bridge & Caves
days.image: Double Decker Living Root Bridge Nongriat jungle trekking
activities: Intense trek to Double Decker Root Bridge via Tyrna (7:00 AM – 11:30 AM)
Swim in rainbow falls natural pool
Return trek with optional longer route via village trail (1:00 PM – 5:00 PM)

days.title: Mawsmai Cave Deep Exploration
days.image: Mawsmai Cave limestone spelunking Cherrapunji adventure
activities: Drive to Cherrapunji, full caving session in Mawsmai and Krem Phyllut cave (9:00 AM – 1:00 PM)
Nohkalikai Falls rim walk (2:30 PM – 4:00 PM)
Night camp at Cherrapunji eco-lodge

days.title: Dawki River Kayaking & Snorkeling
days.image: Dawki Umngot River kayaking clear water adventure
activities: Drive to Dawki, 3-hour kayaking session on Umngot River (9:00 AM – 12:00 PM)
River snorkeling in the transparent waters (1:00 PM – 2:30 PM)
Mawlynnong village bike tour (4:00 PM – 6:00 PM)

days.title: Mawphlang Forest & Departure
days.image: Mawphlang Sacred Forest trail dense canopy Meghalaya
activities: Guided eco-trek through Mawphlang Sacred Forest (7:00 AM – 9:30 AM)
Return to Shillong, hot meal and debrief (11:00 AM – 1:00 PM)
Transfer for departure (2:30 PM onwards)

title: Meghalaya Luxury Cloud Retreat
description: Indulge in the finest Meghalaya has to offer with premium valley-view resorts, private guided tours, and curated culinary experiences. From luxury tented camps near root bridges to helicopter views over Cherrapunji, this package redefines travel in the Northeast.
inclusions: 6 nights in luxury resorts and boutique properties with valley views
All meals including premium dinners with local cuisine
Private luxury cab with dedicated chauffeur
Private guides for all sightseeing and treks
Helicopter joyride over Cherrapunji waterfalls

days.title: Arrival – Luxury Welcome in Shillong
days.image: Shillong luxury resort valley view sunset Meghalaya
activities: VIP arrival, transfer in luxury vehicle to premium resort
Welcome with traditional Khasi hospitality – rice beer and red tea
Private sunset viewing at Shillong Peak (5:30 PM – 7:00 PM)

days.title: Shillong Heritage & Culture
days.image: Don Bosco Museum Shillong Northeast heritage cultural
activities: Private Don Bosco Museum tour with expert curator (10:00 AM – 12:30 PM)
Lunch at Shillong's finest restaurant – Chef's tasting menu
Private Elephant Falls photography session at golden hour (4:30 PM – 6:00 PM)

days.title: Cherrapunji Helicopter & Waterfalls
days.image: Cherrapunji helicopter aerial view waterfalls clouds
activities: Helicopter joyride over Nohkalikai Falls and Seven Sisters (8:00 AM – 9:30 AM)
Private guided tour of Mawsmai Caves with expert geologist (11:00 AM – 12:30 PM)
Luxury dinner at clifftop resort with waterfall backdrop (7:30 PM)

days.title: Private Root Bridge Experience
days.image: Living Root Bridge private guided morning trek Meghalaya
activities: Private early morning trek to Double Decker Root Bridge with botanist guide (6:30 AM – 11:00 AM)
Gourmet packed picnic lunch by the root bridge
Relaxing evening at luxury eco-resort with spa session (4:00 PM – 6:30 PM)

days.title: Dawki Private Boat & Mawlynnong
days.image: Dawki Umngot River private boat luxury experience Meghalaya
activities: Private exclusive boat charter on Umngot River at dawn (7:00 AM – 9:30 AM)
Private village tour of Mawlynnong with local elder storytelling (11:00 AM – 1:30 PM)
Sunset cocktails at hilltop villa overlooking Bangladesh plains (5:30 PM)

days.title: Mawphlang Sacred Forest Ceremony
days.image: Mawphlang Sacred Forest stones ancient ceremony Meghalaya
activities: Private guided ritual walk through Mawphlang Sacred Forest with Khasi elder (8:00 AM – 11:00 AM)
Laitlum Canyon sunrise photography with professional photographer (5:30 AM)
Farewell gala dinner at luxury resort with Nongkrem dance performance (8:00 PM)

days.title: Leisurely Departure
days.image: Meghalaya misty morning departure hills clouds
activities: Leisurely breakfast with valley views
Last minute shopping for organic local honey, bamboo crafts at Ward Lake market
Private airport/station transfer (as per schedule)

title: Meghalaya Cultural Odyssey
description: Immerse yourself in the rich Khasi and Jaintia heritage of Meghalaya. Visit sacred forests, ancient monoliths, traditional markets, and attend the vibrant Wangala harvest festival celebrations. This cultural deep-dive offers an authentic Northeast India experience.
inclusions: 4 nights in heritage homestays with host families
All meals featuring traditional Meghalayan cuisine
Cultural guide for all heritage site visits
Don Bosco Museum and Sacred Forest entry fees
Khasi cooking class with local family
exclusions: Camera fees at restricted heritage sites

days.title: Shillong – Gateway to Khasi Culture
days.image: Shillong traditional Khasi architecture streets heritage
activities: Arrive and check-in with Khasi host family for authentic homestay experience
Don Bosco Centre for Indigenous Cultures – 7-floor museum covering all Northeast tribes (2:00 PM – 5:00 PM)
Evening walk through Police Bazar – local crafts and bamboo market (6:00 PM – 7:30 PM)

days.title: Sacred Forests & Monoliths
days.image: Mawphlang Sacred Forest monoliths ancient Khasi Meghalaya
activities: Guided trek in Mawphlang Sacred Forest with Khasi elder explaining taboos and traditions (9:00 AM – 12:00 PM)
Visit ancient Khasi megalithic monuments and stone memorials near Mawphlang (1:30 PM – 3:30 PM)
Traditional Khasi cooking class – jadoh rice and doh-khlieh salad (5:00 PM – 7:00 PM)

days.title: Cherrapunji – Khasi Heartland
days.image: Cherrapunji Sohra traditional village Khasi culture
activities: Drive to Sohra (Cherrapunji), visit local Khasi market with guide (9:30 AM – 11:00 AM)
Mawsmai village walk – interaction with root bridge maintaining families (12:00 PM – 2:00 PM)
Nohkalikai Falls viewpoint and Dainthlen Falls legend storytelling (3:30 PM – 5:30 PM)

days.title: Mawlynnong – Cleanest Village Experience
days.image: Mawlynnong cleanest village bamboo sky walk community
activities: Drive to Mawlynnong – meet village committee and learn about community sanitation practices (9:00 AM – 12:00 PM)
Dawki border area – Khasi-Bangladeshi cultural exchange zone visit (1:30 PM – 3:00 PM)
Traditional Khasi music and dance evening at Shillong cultural centre (7:00 PM)

days.title: Laitlum & Departure
days.image: Laitlum Canyons Meghalaya traditional Khasi village
activities: Morning walk to Laitlum village with traditional Khasi farmer interaction (7:00 AM – 9:30 AM)
Shopping for local weavings, cane products, and organic spices
Transfer for departure with cultural farewell by host family

title: Meghalaya Quick Escape
description: A perfect weekend escape to the Scotland of the East. Pack in Shillong's best waterfalls, the iconic Living Root Bridge, and the crystal-clear Dawki River in just three action-filled days.
inclusions: 2 nights accommodation in a mid-range hotel in Shillong
Breakfast both mornings
Shared cab transfers to Cherrapunji and Dawki
Root bridge trek local guide fees
Boat ride at Dawki

days.title: Shillong Highlights
days.image: Shillong Ward Lake Elephant Falls quick tour Meghalaya
activities: Arrive Shillong, check-in and freshen up (by noon)
Elephant Falls and Ward Lake (2:00 PM – 5:00 PM)
Evening at Police Bazar – street food and local shopping (6:00 PM – 8:30 PM)

days.title: Cherrapunji & Root Bridge
days.image: Living Root Bridge Nongriat Cherrapunji day trek Meghalaya
activities: Early morning drive to Cherrapunji – Nohkalikai Falls and Mawsmai Cave (8:00 AM – 11:30 AM)
Living Root Bridge trek at Nongriat (12:30 PM – 4:00 PM)
Overnight at Cherrapunji eco-lodge or return to Shillong

days.title: Dawki & Departure
days.image: Dawki Umngot River crystal clear morning boat ride
activities: Drive to Dawki – early morning boat ride on Umngot River (8:00 AM – 10:30 AM)
Quick visit to Mawlynnong village (11:30 AM – 1:00 PM)
Drive back to Shillong for departure (2:30 PM – 5:00 PM)
